description: This file defines API endpoints for managing assets in a FastAPI application. It includes routes for listing, creating, and retrieving assets, with SQLAlchemy ORM integration for database interactions.

methods.name: list[AssetOutMVP] list_assets( q: Optional[str] = Query( None, description="Substring search across tag/name/type/location/manufacturer." ), asset_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset type."), location: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by location."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Handles GET /assets endpoint to list assets with optional filters.

methods.name: AssetOutMVP create_asset(payload: AssetCreateMVP, db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Handles POST /assets endpoint to create a new asset.

methods.name: AssetOutMVP get_asset(asset_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Handles GET /assets/{asset_id} endpoint to retrieve a specific asset by ID.

ctags.name: create_asset
ctags.pattern: /^def create_asset(payload: AssetCreateMVP, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> AssetOutMVP:$/

ctags.name: get_asset
ctags.pattern: /^def get_asset(asset_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)) -> AssetOutMVP:$/

ctags.name: list_assets
ctags.signature: ( q: Optional[str] = Query( None, description="Substring search across tag/name/type/location/manufacturer." ), asset_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset type."), location: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by location."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
